message:
⚡ React perf: add memo, useCallback, useMemo to dashboard cards (#11097)

- Wrap CardWrapper in React.memo to prevent unnecessary re-renders
- Add useCallback for handler props in DashboardCards and Dashboard
- Add useMemo for Object.keys/filter/map chains in ComplianceCards and ClusterCosts
- Extract memoized handlers in NamespaceQuotas

Signed-off-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
